item.name: Antheian Dahlia
item.description:
A king among antheia, and lord of the waters of Lethe.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: The fins of this striking wavekin resemble the delicate petals of the dahlia. With the addition of new antheian varieties, the original creator hoped to turn the waters of Lethe into a shifting field of flowers.

obj.n: Tome of Ichthyological Folklore - The World Unsundered
